raw_output:
The classic case of the missing cookie. I've been pondering this for a while now, and I must say, it's a curious one.

First, let me think about the suspects. Who had access to the cookie jar? The children in the house? Perhaps they were too eager, too excited, and just couldn't resist the temptation of that delicious treat. But then again, we can't rule out the possibility that one of them might have been hiding something, or perhaps was even playing a prank on their siblings.

Or maybe it wasn't the kids at all? What about our beloved family pet, who's always sneaking around when no one's looking? That furry little thief could've easily snatched up a cookie and made off with it. But then again, that would be quite an unusual behavior for an animal of their kind.

And then there's the possibility that someone just happened to be passing by the kitchen at the time, and, well... who can resist the allure of a fresh-baked cookie? It could've been anyone, really – a neighbor, a delivery person, or even a ghostly apparition!

Now, I know what you're thinking: "But where's the evidence?" Ah, my friend, that's the best part. You see, the game is not just about solving the mystery of the missing cookie but also about understanding human nature – and the lengths to which people (and animals) will go for something as simple yet delectable as a cookie.

In the end, it's up to you to decide who stole the cookie. I've given you my expert analysis, now it's your turn to crack the case!
